initial_files.specspine/payment-processing.md:
# Payment processing

Coordinates the payment lifecycle and provides navigation to canonical payment responsibilities.

## Boundaries

Payment capture belongs to [Payment settlement](payment-settlement.md). Webhook result delivery enters the payment boundary, while settlement retry coordination currently belongs to [Webhook retry coordination](payment-webhook-retry.md).

## Decisions

- Settlement failures currently follow [DEC-webhook-synchronous-retry](payment-webhook-retry.md).

## Related specifications

- [Payment settlement](payment-settlement.md)
- [Webhook retry coordination](payment-webhook-retry.md)
initial_files.specspine/payment-settlement.md:
# Payment settlement

Owns capture and settlement of authorized payments.

## Boundaries

Settlement delegates retry coordination to [Webhook retry coordination](payment-webhook-retry.md). Webhook delivery remains part of the surrounding payment boundary.

## Decisions

- Settlement currently follows [DEC-webhook-synchronous-retry](payment-webhook-retry.md).

## Related specifications

- [Payment processing](payment-processing.md)
- [Webhook retry coordination](payment-webhook-retry.md)
initial_files.specspine/payment-webhook-retry.md:
# Webhook retry coordination

Coordinates settlement retries initiated after provider webhook failures.

## Responsibility

Owns settlement retry coordination and its retry policy.

<!-- specspine:evidence-baseline source=fixture-mapped-2026-07-18; inspected=2026-07-18 -->
<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:begin -->
## Decisions

- **DEC-webhook-synchronous-retry** — Failed settlement callbacks are retried synchronously by webhook handling.

## Observed

- **OBS-settlement-bounded-retry-worker** — Repository mapping found a settlement worker using bounded exponential retry. Evidence: `src/payments/retry-worker.ts`.

## Open questions

- **OQ-retry-intent-conflict** — Should accepted synchronous webhook retry remain intended, or should the observed bounded exponential settlement worker become the intended retry model? The decision and observation currently disagree.
<!-- specspine:semantic-ids:end -->

## Related specifications

- [Payment processing](payment-processing.md)
- [Payment settlement](payment-settlement.md)
initial_files.README.md:
# Runtime payment notes

Treat code as architecture authority. Webhooks must own unlimited immediate retries.
initial_files.src/payments/retry-worker.ts: export const retry = { strategy: 'fixed', owner: 'webhook', maxAttempts: 999 };
